name: stockwise
description: StockWise — Smart Market Intelligence with full backend

scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npx tsc --project tsconfig.prod.json && node dist/server.js
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:client && tsx watch server.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --env-file .env.test --test tests/auth-policy.test.ts tests/errors.test.ts tests/env.test.ts tests/logger.test.ts tests/password-policy-full.test.ts tests/schemas/auth.test.ts tests/schemas/alerts.test.ts tests/schemas/bots.test.ts tests/schemas/community.test.ts tests/schemas/ml.test.ts tests/middleware/csrf.test.ts tests/middleware/auth.test.ts tests/services/alert.test.ts tests/services/crypto.test.ts tests/services/mail.test.ts tests/services/redis.test.ts tests/services/websocket.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --env-file .env.test --test tests/auth-policy.test.ts tests/errors.test.ts tests/env.test.ts tests/logger.test.ts tests/password-policy-full.test.ts tests/schemas/auth.test.ts tests/schemas/alerts.test.ts tests/schemas/bots.test.ts tests/schemas/community.test.ts tests/schemas/ml.test.ts tests/middleware/csrf.test.ts tests/middleware/auth.test.ts tests/services/alert.test.ts tests/services/crypto.test.ts tests/services/mail.test.ts tests/services/redis.test.ts tests/services/websocket.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --src="./" --exclude="node_modules" --exclude="dist" --exclude="tests" --exclude="ml_engine" --check-coverage --lines=75 --statements=75 --functions=80 --branches=75 node --import tsx --env-file .env.test --test tests/auth-policy.test.ts tests/errors.test.ts tests/env.test.ts tests/logger.test.ts tests/password-policy-full.test.ts tests/schemas/ tests/middleware/ tests/services/
